title: GOI Gas Loop
subtitle: Cattura delle emissioni per un ciclo virtuoso dell’azoto nell’allevamento suino
description: A factsheet describing the implementation of an innovative ammonia washing system in pig farming to reduce ammonia and greenhouse gas emissions by capturing and converting ammonia into ammonium sulfate fertilizer. It details the technology’s development, on-farm monitoring results, nutrient recovery, and assessment of environmental and economic sustainability.
